ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., manager, staff) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the manager */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the manager belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the manager */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the manager was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "transport_authority_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transport authority managing the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., station, stop, terminal) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_transport_authority_id FOREIGN KEY ("transport_authority_id") REFERENCES transport_authorities ("authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transport_authorities" (
  "authority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transport authority */,
  "authority_name" TEXT /* Name of the transport authority */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the transport authority */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the transport authority */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the transport authority */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modes_of_transport" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mode of transport */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the mode of transport (e.g., Train, Subway) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mode of transport */,
  "transport_type" TEXT /* Type of transport (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journeys" (
  "journey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journey */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who took the journey */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the journey */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the journey */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the journey */,
  "start_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the start location */,
  "end_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the end location */,
  "mode_of_transport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mode of transport */,
  "charge" REAL /* Charge amount for the journey */,
  "credit" REAL /* Credit amount for the journey */,
  "balance" REAL /* Running balance of the employee's travel account */,
  "note" TEXT /* Notes or comments for the journey */,
  "travel_report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the travel report associated with the journey */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the journey */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the journey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journeys_travel_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("travel_report_id") REFERENCES travel_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journeys_start_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journeys_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journeys_end_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journeys_mode_of_transport_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_of_transport_id") REFERENCES modes_of_transport ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel report */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who submitted the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount claimed in the report */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the manager who approved the report */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the report was approved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_reports_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_reports_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "balance_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each balance change event */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee whose balance was changed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the balance change */,
  "balance_change" REAL /* Amount of the balance change (positive for credits, negative for charges) */,
  "balance_after_change" REAL /* Balance after the change */,
  "note" TEXT /* Notes or comments for the balance change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the balance change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balance_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the travel policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the travel policy */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the policy became effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the policy expires */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of policy (e.g., standard, premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance check */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the travel report being checked */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the travel policy being applied */,
  "compliant" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the report is compliant */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for non-compliance (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_compliance_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES travel_policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_compliance_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES travel_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, logout, create report) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the notification */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the external system */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the integration */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for the integration */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the integration is enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)
